resources.string: Ngwa a wụnyere ga-apụta ebe a.
Enweghi ike imepe %s mgbe Ọnọdụ dị mfe gbanye.
Enweghị ike iji Gaming Hub na ọnọdụ nchekwa.
Enweghị ike ịgbakwunye ibe edokọbara. Ị nweburu ibe edokọbara aha na ngwa a.
%s na Ebenrụtụaka dị ka egwuregwu wee kwaga na Egwuregwu m.
Enweghị ike ịgbakwunye ndokọba. Enwere nsogbu na eserese a.
Iji ebenrụtụaka gasị, ị kwesịrị ikwe ka ikikere ndị a na mwube.

Ebenrụtụaka peeji weebụ, onyonyo ndị echekwara, ma ọ bụ ngwa ndị ị na-ejikarị mgbe ị na-egwu egwuregwu. Ị nwere ike mee ebenrụtụaka ha ebe a ma ọ bụ site na ịkpatụ %s Ọdụmbi na Ebengosi ma ọ bụ Ịntanetị Samsung, wee kpatụ Ebenrụtụaka Gaming Hub.

Ebenrụtụaka peeji weebụ, onyonyo ndị echekwara, ma ọ bụ ngwa ndị ị na-ejikarị mgbe ị na-egwu egwuregwu. Ị nwere ike mee ebenrụtụaka ha ebe a ma ọ bụ site na ịkpatụ ịkekọrịta Ọdụmbi na Ebengosi ma ọ bụ Ịntanetị Samsung, wee kpatụ Ebenrụtụaka Gaming Hub.
Enweghị ike ịdokọba. Ị nweelarị ndokọba jiri aha na adreesị a.
Egwuregwu gị ozugbo ga-apụta ebe a.
"Egwuregwu ngwa ngwa ị gwuru ma ọ bụ lelee n'ime ụbọchị 30 gara aga ga-apụta ebe a. Nke a gụnyere egwuregwu ị chọtara site na ịkpatụ ọdụmbi na-esote."
Otu nnọkọ kacha ogologo kwa egwuregwu
Egosiri data maka ọnwa 12 gara aga.
"Ị gwuru obere ihe n'izu a karịa izu gara aga. Lelee akụkọ egwuregwu gị n'uju."
"Ị gwuru egwu karịa ihe n'izu a karịa izu gara aga. Lelee akụkọ egwuregwu gị n'uju."
Egosiri metrik etinyegoro ohụrụ na Gaming Hub 8.0 site na ụbọchị etinyere ụdị ahụ.
Ọ nweghị egwuregwu akpọrọ nso a
Iji data ekwentị mkpanaaka ịkwanye vidio nwere ike bute gbaa ụgwọ ndị ọzọ.
Gwuo egwuregwu ahụ ka ịhụ akara gị dị elu ebe a.
Nweta akara %d ka ịkwaga na pasenti na-esote.
Ihe ezighi ezi mere. Nwaa ọzọ ma emechaa.
Data egwuregwu gị bụ maka naanị ekwentị a.
Data egwuregwu gị bụ maka naanị tabletị a.
"O nweghị ndị enyi gị nọ n'ịntanetị"
Onwere onye ejirila aha otutu ahụ. Gbalịa ihe ọzọ.
Enweghị ike iji aha otutu a. Gbalịa ihe ọzọ.
Ka ịdekọ oge egwuregwu gị nke ọma, ịkwesịrị ikwe ka ị soche ojiji na Ntọala.
"Iji gaa n'ihu, gbanye Android WebView System na Ntọala > Ngwa."
Ịkwesịrị ịme ka ngwa YouTube dị na Ntọala ka ịmechaa ihe a.
Kpatụ ebe a iji wepụ ụda egwuregwu
Kpatụ ebe a iji wepụ ụda egwuregwu
Kpatụ ebe a ka ịchịkọta egwuregwu gị niile maka nweta ozugbo, na nweta ozi gbasara egwuregwu dị ọkụ ka ịlele.
Edere aha otutu gị dị ka ihe na-ekwesịghị ekwesị wee hazigharịa ya ka aha gị site na Samsung account gị. Ị nwere ike ịhazi aha otutu ọhụrụ na profaịlụ onye egwuregwu gị.
Banye ka ịhụ akara gị dị elu yana ndị ọzọ.
Gbalịa egwuregwu ndị a na-ewu ugbu a, na-enweghị nbudata.
Gwuo ugbu a. Enweghị nbudata achọrọ.
Enyere egwuregwu a maka ndị ọrụ %d ma ọ bụ karịa.
Egwuregwu mbufe a nwere ike iji nnukwu data nke ngagharị.
Chọpụta ma gbasaa nke ngagharị egwuregwu kacha mma, ahaziri maka gị. Enweghị mbudata. Enweghị nchere. Naanị kpatụ wee kpọọ ozugbo.
"Banye ngwa ngwa n'egwuregwu kacha amasị gị site na iji ngwaọrụ na-eme ka njikwa egwuregwu dị mfe ma na-edobe ihe niile ị na-sochie, gụnyere Egwuregwu ozugbo."
Gbasaa ogwe ahụ ka ịhụ egwuregwu gị na nso a, ọba akwụkwọ egwuregwu awụnyere gị na bọtịnụ ogbi.
"Banye ngwa ngwa n'egwuregwu kacha amasị gị site na iji ngwaọrụ na-eme ka njikwa egwuregwu dị mfe ma na-edobe ihe niile ị na-sochie, gụnyere Egwuregwu ozugbo."
Sụgharịa aka ekpe ma ọ bụ aka nri na ogwe ngwaọrụ iji lelee egwuregwu ị gwuru nso nso a.
Ka ịdekọ oge egwuregwu gị nke ọma, ịkwesịrị ikwe ka ị sochie ojiji.
"Gaa n'ihu na nnweta ohere ojiji data?"
Ma ekwentị gị jijiji mgbe ị na-eji Game Launcher malite egwuregwu ịhọrọ mkpịsị aka.
Ma tabletị gị jijiji mgbe ị na-eji Game Launcher malite egwuregwu ịhọrọ mkpịsị aka.
Ma jijiji iji malite obere egwuregwu
Gbanwee ndabere nke ọba akwụkwọ ka ọ bụrụ onyonyo nke gị.
Nweta oge egwuregwu ziri ezi karịa.
Ihe mgbako oge egwuregwu ka mma
"Akwadoghị atụmatụ ndị a n'ihu ọha, yabụ nsonaazụ gị nwere ike ịdị iche."
"Game Booster ka ga-arụ ọrụ n'oge egwuregwu."
Ị ka ga-enwe ike iji njirimara egwuregwu Galaxy na egwuregwu a mgbe ewepụchara ya.
Ihe ezighi ezi mere mgbe ị na-ewepụ egwuregwu a. Nwaa ọzọ ma emechaa.
"Họrọ ebe egwuregwu ọhụrụ ga-apụta n'ọba akwụkwọ gị."
Gbakwunye ndokọba ka ịhụ ha ebe a.
Ị nwere profaịlụ naanị maka egwuregwu. Lelee ya!
Nnọọ! Lelee profaịlụ gamer ọhụrụ gị.
Nweta ọkwa maka nkwalite na ozi ahịa?
Ị kwetara ịnata ozi ire ahịa %1$s na %2$s. Ka ịgbanwee ntọala a, gaa na %3$s.
Lelee njikọ netwọk gị wee nwaa ọzọ.
Kpọọ ma ọ bụ wụnye ụfọdụ egwuregwu ka ịhụ ha ebe a.
A ga-emechi ụda egwuregwu, mana olu ekwentị gị agaghị agbanwe. Wepụ ogbi site na ịpị ọdụmbi olu elu ma ọ bụ ala mgbe ị na-egwu egwuregwu.
A ga-emechi ụda egwuregwu, mana olu tabletị gị agaghị agbanwe. Wepụ ogbi site na ịpị ọdụmbi olu elu ma ọ bụ ala mgbe ị na-egwu egwuregwu.
Banye iji sochie mmereme Egwuregwu gị ozugbo.
"Egwuregwu ngwa ngwa ị gwuru ma ọ bụ lelee n'ime ụbọchị 30 gara aga ga-apụta ebe a."
Ihe ezighi ezi mere mgbe ị na-etinye data egwuregwu. Nwaa ọzọ ma emechaa.
Tinye Gaming Hub na Ihuenyo bé?
"Hụ egwuregwu niile ị kpọrọ n'Egwuregwu ndị m."
Ị wunyebeghị egwuregwu gasị ọ bụla. Gaa na Galaxy Store ka ịlele ụfọdụ egwuregwu gasị ị nwere ike ịmasị gị.
Kpatụ ugboro abụọ iji kpọọ egwuregwu
A ga-egosi egwuregwu ị na-egwukarị ebe a.
Kpatụ ebe a ka ịgbanwee gaa na nlele ọba akwụkwọ.
Ị rịọla mmachi nhazi data nkeonwe gị maka ọrụ a. Iji wepu mmachi, gaa na weebụsaịtị ebe ị rịọrọ arịrịọ.
Ị kwetara ịnweta nkwalite Gaming Hub na akụkọ gbasara egwuregwu na %s. Ka ịgbanwee nke a, gaa na Mwube> Nweta nkwalite na ozi gbasara egwuregwu.
Anyị ga-eme ka ị mata gbasara mbelata ego, mmereme pụrụ iche na ndị ọzọ.
Ị weghaara nkwekọrịta gị ịnweta nkwalite Gaming Hub na akụkọ gbasara egwuregwu na %s. Ka ịgbanwee nke a, gaa na Mwube> Nweta nkwalite na ozi gbasara egwuregwu.
Chọrọ nkwalite na ozi gbasara egwuregwu ndị a?
Zoo akara ngosi egwuregwu na Ihuenyo ngwa?
Zoo egwuregwu na Ihuenyo Mbụ na Ngwa?
%1$s agaghị arụ ọrụ mgbe agbanyụrụ %2$s na %3$s. Ị nwere ike gbanye ya na Mwube.
Ndị mmadụ na-egwu na nso-nso a
Jikọọ akaụntụ Discord gị ka ịhụ egwuregwu ndị enyi gị na-egwu.
Nweta ọkwa maka nkwalite na ozi ahịa?
Ị kwetara ịnata ozi ire ahịa %1$s na %2$s. Ka ịgbanwee ntọala a, gaa na %3$s.
Lelee njikọ netwọk gị wee nwaa ọzọ.
Banye na nlele ihuenyo zuru oke iji kesaa oge egwuregwu gị.
Egwu ọhụrụ ozugbo ka ị lelee.
Rụzuo ọrụ gị iji nweta akwa.
Pụta akwa ka ịgbakwunye ihe okike.
Rụzuo ọrụ iji nweta akwa. Pụta akwa ahụ iji zute ihe okike gị.
Banye maka Egwuregwu Ozugbo. Nweta ohere ha site na ogwe ngwaọrụ.
Lelee njikọ netwọk gị wee nwaa ọzọ.
Ọ nweghị ngwa gị nwere ike ime ihe a.
Enweghị ike ịhụ netwọk ọ bụla dị.
"Enweghị ike imepe egwuregwu a n'ihi na ewunye ya."
Họrọ ebe ị ga-enweta nziọkwa egwuregwu gị.
Iji nweta nziọkwa sitere na %1$s, gbanye ohere nziọkwa maka %2$s na Ntọala.
Họrọ ma ị ga-ahụ nziọkwa gị gasị na Gaming Hub ma ọ bụ na ogwe nziọkwa.
Iji jiri nrụọrụ a, ị ga-enye ikike na-esote ohere na ndiwube.
A na-eji eme ka ị mara maka mmereme, ntụnye na ndị ọzọ
Kpatụ ebe a ka ịchịkọta egwuregwu gị niile maka nweta ozugbo, na nweta ozi gbasara egwuregwu dị ọkụ ka ịlele.
Mechie ụda egwuregwu gị, ọ bụghị ekwentị nke ọzọ gị. Gwuo na Gaming Hub maka nke a na njimara ndị ọzọ mara mma.
Mechie ụda egwuregwu gị, ọ bụghị Tabletị nke ọzọ gị. Gwuo na Gaming Hub maka nke a na njimara ndị ọzọ mara mma.
Shhh! Mee ka egwuregwu gị dị jụụ
Lelee vidiyo YouTube, hụ egwuregwu ndị na-enweta ndị egwuregwu na ndị ọzọ.
Ị ka nwere ike iji ọrụ bụ isi nke ngwa na-enyeghị ikikere nhọrọ.
A na-eji eme ka ị mara maka mmereme, ntụnye na ndị ọzọ
A na-eji agbakwunye foto na ndokọba gị
A na-eji kesaa ma chekwaa onyonyo wee chekwaa Usoro na Ọnọdụ
Achọrọ ikikere ndị a maka ọrụ ngwa. Maka ikike nhọrọ, agbanyere arụrụ arụ ọrụ, mana ekweghi ya.
Egwuregwu ga-egosi na usoro iheomume egwuregwu
Cyclops mmemme nwere mpi na ndụdụ
Ihu isi mkpịsị aka yi okpu
Ihu isi mkpịsị aka nwere eriri ntutu
Ihu isi mkpịsị aka na-ege egwu
Viking gbara ajị agba ji anyụike agha
Nnukwu dike yi uwe akwụkwọ ndụ
"Amoosu ajị agba ji mkpara na bọọlụ ọkụ n'aka"
Oke elf na-acha anụnụ na-agba ụta
Nwoke ọjọọ yi okpokoro isi na uwe na-acha mmemme
Nwanyị na-arụ ọgụ nwere ogologo ntutu isi
Ka ịhụ agụgụala akpọrọ gị, nye nweta ohere data ojiji gị na Mwube.
Nweta uru pụrụiche na Galaxy gị.
"Mepee Gaming Hub ọzọ iji gaa n'ihu."
Ị rịọrọ ka ihichapụ data nkeonwe gị. Njimara ndị Gaming Hub na-eji Samsung account gị agaghị adị ruo mgbe usoro ahụ zuru.
Chekwaa mgbanwe gị maọbụ tụfuo ha?
Jiri mkpịsị aka abụọ mup elu ma ọ bụ ala ka ịmuogharịa.
Kpọọ vidiyo na-akpaghị aka site na iji data mkpanaka
Nhazi na ịkekọrịta data maka ebumnuche ahịa
Na Gaming Hub yana Ihuenyo bé na Ngwa ndị
Ị nwere ike ịrịọ ka ehichapụ data Gaming Hub gị na %1$shttps://privacy.samsung.com%2$s.
"Data Gaming Hub gị niile e chekwara n'ime ekwentị yana Samsung a ga-ehichapụ ha®. Njimara Gaming Hub na-eji Samsung account gị agaghị adị ruo mgbe usoro ahụ zuru."
A ga-ehichapụ data Gaming Hub gị niile dị na tabletị ma chekwaa site na Samsung. Njimara Gaming Hub na-eji Samsung account gị agaghị adị ruo mgbe usoro ahụ zuru.
Hichapụ data Gaming Hub gị kpamkpam?
Nweta ozi na onyinye pụrụ iche
Ị nwere ike ịchọpụta maka onyinye pụrụiche yana njimara ọhụrụ sitere na %s na ngwa Samsung ndị ọzọ site na ịgbanye Nweta ozi ọma na onyinye pụrụ iche na ntọala Samsung account.
Ọ bụrụ na ịgbanyụọ %1$s, ị ga-akwụsị ịnata ozi na onyinye ọ bụghị naanị site na %2$s kamakwa site na ngwa na ọrụ Samsung ndị ọzọ.
Ọ bụrụ na ịchọrọ ịkwụsị ịnata ozi na onyinye pụrụ iche sitere na ngwa Samsung niile, gaa na %1$sNtọala > Samsung account > Nchekwa na nzuzo%2$s wee gbanyụọ %3$s.
Rịba ama na ụfọdụ ngwa na ọrụ Samsung nwere njikwa nke ha maka ozi ahịa. Njikwa ndị ahụ na-emetụta naanị ahịa ezitere na ngwa na ọrụ ndị ahụ enweghị njikọ na ntọala a.
Chekwaa ọkpụkpọ gị na egwuregwu igweojii
"A ga-awụnye egwuregwu igweojii na-akpaghị aka ka ị nwee ike ịga n'ihu ebe ị kwụsịrị."
"Agaghị awụnye egwuregwu igweojii ọhụrụ na-akpaghị aka. A ga-ehichapụ ime egwuregwu maka egwuregwu igweojii nke ebudatara, na agaghị echekwa ime egwuregwu n'ọdịnihu."
"Gbanyụọ Chekwa egwuregwu gị n'ime egwuregwu igweojii?"
Nweta ozi na onyinye pụrụ iche
Na %1$s, ị weghaara nkwekọrịta nkwalite na ozi gbasara egwuregwu site na %2$s.
Na %1$s, ị kwenyere ịnweta nkwalite na ozi gbasara egwuregwu site na %2$s.
Banye ka iji profaịlụ onye egwuregwu gị, hụ mkpokọta ihe okike gị na ndị ọzọ.
Họrọ ebe ị ga-egosi egwuregwu gị.
Egwuregwu egosiri na Gaming Hub yana Ihuenyo bé na Ngwa ndị.
Iji mepee %s, kpatụ Ntọala, gaa na Ozi ngwa> ikikere, wee nye ikike ndị a:
Ụdị %s ọhụrụ dị. Melite iji nwalee njirimara kachasị ọhụrụ.
Banye na Samsung account gị ka ijiri Gaming Hub.
A ga-ehichapụ data Gaming Hub gị, enweghị ike ị nwetaghachi ya. Ngwa egwuregwu gị ga-adị na ihuenyo ngwa.
Hapụ Gaming Hub wee hichapụ data gị?
Ị nwere ike ịbanye na Samsung account gị iji mepee Gaming Hub, mechie Gaming Hub ugbu a, maọbụ hapụ Gaming Hub ma hichapụ data Gaming Hub gị.
"Banye iji gaa n'ihu na-eji Gaming Hub"
Ihe ezighi ezi mere. Nwaa ọzọ ma emechaa.
A ga-ehichapụ data ngwa a niile kpamkpam. Nke a gụnyere faịlụ, mwube, akaụntụ, ebe nchekwa data niile wdg.
A na-agbakwunye egwuregwu na-akpaghị aka ka ị nwee ike ịhụ ihe ịchọrọ ịkpọ.
Hụ ihe dị ọhụrụ na Egwuregwu Ozugbo
ID onye ọrụ maka mgbasa ozi
Iji data ekwentị mkpanaaka ịkwanye vidio nwere ike bute gbaa ụgwọ ndị ọzọ.
Melite ahụmịhe mgbasa ozi gị site na iji mgbasa ozi ahaziri
Nweta mgbasa ozi ahaziri onwe gị site na ikwe ka Samsung nakọta ma jiri ozi nkeonwe gị (nhọrọ)
Nweta mgbasa ozi ahaziri onwe ya site na Ịkekọrịta ozi nkeonwe gị na ndị mmekọ azụmahịa Samsung (nhọrọ)
Get personalized ads while you use this app.
Information about your phone and app, including your phone’s identifiers such as the IP address and ad ID, will be used by Samsung’s business partners who may provide the personalized ads.
Information about your tablet and app, including your tablet’s identifiers such as the IP address and ad ID, will be used by Samsung’s business partners who may provide the personalized ads.
You can turn this off at any time in the app settings.
If you don’t agree, you’ll still receive the same number of ads, but they won’t be personalized.
For more information about how your data is processed, see the %1$sPrivacy Notice%2$s.
Melite ahụmịhe mgbasa ozi gị site na iji mgbasa ozi ahaziri
Mgbe ọ bụla ịwụnyere egwuregwu ọhụrụ, ị ga-enwe ike ịhụ ya na Gaming Hub.
Hazie egwuregwu gị, ndokọba saịtị egwuregwu bara uru, jikwaa oge egwuregwu gị, nweta Kupọns pụrụ iche na ọtụtụ ndị ọzọ.
"Gosi ngwa egwuregwu naanị n'ime Gaming Hub"
Gosi ngwa egwuregwu na Gaming Hub naanị (nhọrọ)
Lelee %1$sỌkwa Nzuzo%2$s anyị ka ịhụ ka anyị si ejikwa data gị.
Iji gaba n’ihu, kwenye na %1$sNziọkwa Nzuzo%2$s.
"Site na ịga n'ihu, ị kwenyere na %1$sỌkwa Nzuzo%2$s."
Lelee %1$sNziọkwa Nzuzo%2$s ma iji hụ ka anyị si ejikwa ozi gị wee soro Iwu Nchedo Data Nkeonwe.
Lelee %1$sỌkwa Nzuzo%2$s anyị ka ịhụ ka anyị si ejikwa data gị.
Lelee %1$sNziọkwa Nzuzo%2$s ma iji hụ ka anyị si ejikwa ozi gị wee soro Iwu Nchedo Data Nkeonwe.
"Site na ịga n'ihu, ị kwenyere na %1$sNziọkwa Nzuzo emelitere%2$s."
Lelee %1$sNziọkwa Nzuzo%2$s emelitere ka ịhụ ka anyị siri jikwaa data gị.
"Site na ịga n'ihu, ị kwenyere na emelitere anyị na %1$sUsoro na Ọnọdụ%2$s."
"Site na ịga n'ihu, ị kwenyere na emelitere anyị na %1$sUsoro na Ọnọdụ%2$s na %3$sNziọkwa Nzuzo%4$s."
"Site na-ịga n'ihu, ị kwenyere na %1$sUsoro na Ọnọdụ%2$s."
"Site na-ịga n'ihu, ị kwenyere na %1$s Usoro na Ọnọdụ%2$s na %3$s Ọkwa Nzuzo%4$s."
"Site na ịga n'ihu, ị kwenyere na %1$sUsoro na Ọnọdụ%2$s na %3$s Ọkwa Nzuzo%4$s."
Jiri ozi nkeonwe m nye nkwalite na ozi gbasara egwuregwu (nhọrọ)
Nweta ozi na onyinye pụrụ iche
"Iji gaa n'ihu, kwenye na ndị a:"
Enweghị ike imepe %s. Hichapụ ụfọdụ faịlụ ma ọ bụ wepụ ngwa ejighi ya, wee nwaa ọzọ.
Ekwenyere m na nhazi data na ịkerịta ụdị data m pụrụ iche.
Ekwenyere m ịnweta ozi na onyinye pụrụ iche. (nhọrọ)
Ekwenyere m na Usoro na Ọnọdụ.
Ị gaghị enweta ụgwọ ọrụ maka ikiri mgbasa ozi a.
Lelee njikọ netwọk gị wee nwaa ọzọ.
